title: Latvian cabinet approves its own plan of action
summary_full: With a little over two months to go until the next parliamentary electionson October 3rd, the Cabinet of Ministers approved its action plan of the government led by Andris Kulbergs on Tuesday, July 21st – in effect rubber stamping its own plan two months after it came to power.
